## Freelance Service Agreement

### Preamble

This Freelance Service Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of January 15, 2025 ("Effective Date"), by and between TechStartup Inc., a California corporation, acting through Sarah Johnson, Marketing Director ("Client"), and Chen Creative Studio, a California entity, represented by Alex Chen, Senior Designer ("Freelancer").

### Recitals

WHEREAS, Client desires to engage Freelancer to perform certain visual identity design services for the project titled "Brand Refresh 2025"; and WHEREAS, Freelancer has the expertise and agrees to perform such services under the terms and conditions set forth herein; NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

---

## Clauses (12 total)

### Definitions

*Type: standard*

1.1 "Project" refers to the Brand Refresh 2025 visual identity redesign including logo, color palette, typography, and brand guidelines document.
1.2 "Deliverables" means the tangible items set forth in Section 3 to be delivered by Freelancer to Client.
1.3 "Effective Date" means January 15, 2025, the date this Agreement becomes effective.
1.4 "Revisions" means modifications made by Freelancer after Client’s review, limited to the number specified in Section 6.

### Scope of Services

*Type: standard*

Freelancer shall perform professional design services necessary to complete the Project as described in this Agreement. Services include creation of logo concepts, selected logo refinement, brand guidelines document, and final asset package delivery as further detailed in the Deliverables.

### Deliverables and Timeline

*Type: standard*

3.1 Freelancer shall deliver the following items according to the schedule and payment amounts below:
  a) Logo concepts (3 options) - Due on January 30, 2025 - $2,000
  b) Selected logo refinement - Due on February 15, 2025 - $1,500
  c) Brand guidelines document - Due on March 1, 2025 - $2,500
  d) Asset package delivery - Due on March 15, 2025 - $2,500
3.2 Freelancer shall use commercially reasonable efforts to meet the delivery deadlines. Time is of the essence for this Agreement.

### Payment Terms

*Type: standard*

4.1 The total Contract price shall be $8,500.
4.2 Client shall pay an initial deposit of $2,550 upon execution of this Agreement.
4.3 Remaining payments shall be made upon completion of each milestone as listed in Section 3.
4.4 Freelancer shall invoice Client for each milestone. Payment is due within fifteen (15) calendar days of invoice date.
4.5 Late payments are subject to interest at the rate of 1.5% per month or the maximum permitted by California law, whichever is less.

### Revisions

*Type: standard*

Client is entitled to three (3) rounds of revisions per Deliverable. Additional revisions will be billed separately at Freelancer’s standard hourly rate, subject to prior Client approval.

### Intellectual Property Ownership

*Type: standard*

6.1 Upon full payment, Freelancer assigns to Client all worldwide rights, title, and interest in the Deliverables created exclusively for the Project.
6.2 Freelancer retains no rights to use the Deliverables except for portfolio and marketing purposes, provided Client’s confidential information is not disclosed.
6.3 Freelancer represents that the Deliverables will be original work and will not infringe any third party intellectual property rights.

### Confidentiality

*Type: standard*

Each party agrees to keep confidential and not disclose any proprietary or confidential information of the other party without prior written consent, except as required by law or as necessary to perform this Agreement.

### Cancellation and Termination

*Type: standard*

8.1 Either party may terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days written notice if the other party breaches any material term and fails to cure within such period.
8.2 Upon termination, Client shall pay Freelancer for all work performed and expenses incurred up to the termination date.
8.3 Sections 6 (Intellectual Property Ownership), 7 (Confidentiality), 9 (Limitation of Liability), 10 (Governing Law), and 11 (General Provisions) shall survive termination.

### Limitation of Liability

*Type: standard*

Except for damages arising from gross negligence or willful misconduct, neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of this Agreement. Freelancer’s total liability shall not exceed the total fees paid by Client under this Agreement.

### Independent Contractor Status

*Type: standard*

Freelancer is an independent contractor and not an employee, partner, or agent of Client. Freelancer shall comply with California’s ABC test under Assembly Bill 5 (AB5) and any applicable labor laws. Freelancer shall be solely responsible for all taxes, insurance, and benefits related to Freelancer’s performance under this Agreement.

### Governing Law and Venue

*Type: standard*

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to its conflict of law principles. Any disputes arising under this Agreement shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in the County of San Francisco, California.

### General Provisions

*Type: standard*

12.1 Entire Agreement: This Agreement constitutes the entire understanding of the parties and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, and communications.
12.2 Amendments: Any modification or amendment must be in writing and signed by both parties.
12.3 Severability: If any provision is held unenforceable, the remainder shall remain in full force and effect.
12.4 Waiver: No waiver of any breach shall be deemed a waiver of any subsequent breach.
12.5 Assignment: Neither party may assign this Agreement without prior written consent of the other party.
12.6 Notices: All notices shall be in writing and sent to the parties’ addresses or emails indicated in this Agreement or as updated in writing.
